comics.title: How the Little Brother Who Turned Into a Girl Became His Big Brother's Girlfriend
comics.desc:
When I returned home for the first time in a long time, my little brother transformed into a girl!?

---
**Link:**
- [Fantia 18+ Content](https://mangadex.org/title/7a23de9c-01b8-43bd-ac38-0bfe0bebcc3b)

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
"Juliana, hôn sự của mày đã được quyết định"

Ngay khoảnh khắc nghe thấy những lời đó, một linh hồn nam nhân đặc biệt đã thức tỉnh bên trong tiểu thư bá tước yếu đuối.

Julius, "Hàn Huyết Đế". kẻ từng chồng vô số xác chết để trở thành bá chủ lục địa, nay lại tái sinh trong thân thể của một tiểu thư quý tộc.

Dù thế giới có vẻ hòa bình, nhưng nghèo đói, dịch bệnh và những kẻ xấu xa lợi dụng chúng vẫn chưa bao giờ biến mất.

Giờ đây, mang trong mình sức mạnh và uy nghiêm của hoàng đế, cô gái ấy sẽ quét sạch mọi tội ác đang vấy bẩn đế quốc này!

Được chuyển thể từ tiểu thuyết cùng tên, tác phẩm đạt giải thưởng "Nhân Vật" tại giải thưởng tiểu thuyết Fantasy lần thứ 16. Cùng tận hưởng câu chuyện kỳ ảo và độc đáo đầy kịch tính chính thức bắt đầu!

chapters.name: Chapter 2: Thân tín ngày đó, Hoàng đế đổi thay
Chapter 2: Bất biến thần tử, biến cải quân vương
Chapter 3: Nụ cười của Hoàng Đế
Chapter 5: Hoàng Đế làm mạo hiểm giả
Chapter 7: Những ngày tháng thường nhật sụp đổ
Chapter 9: Thử thách của kì lân
Chapter 10: Miko của Kim Áp Đình
Chapter 11: Sức mạnh để có thể bảo vệ
Chapter 12: Ai đã giết thành phố này

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
Mahiro Oyama was just a normal erotic-game loving dude...until he woke up one morning as a woman! Turns out his mad-scientist little sister, Mihari, tried out one of her new experiments on him...with a disastrous outcome, as far as Mahiro's concerned! But Mihari is as determined to study him as he is determined to go back to his shut-in, game-playing life, and one thing's for sure...life is going to get a whole lot weirder from here on out!

*5th place of Tsugi Manga Awards, Category Webmanga

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc: Kiếm thánh vĩ đại nhất mọi thời đại, Arnoick, đã chết. Kỹ năng kiếm thuật của ông được truyền lại cho người học trò, và tưởng chừng câu chuyện của ông ta đã kết thúc. Nhưng rồi, Arnoick đã được tái sinh thành cô hầu gái xinh đẹp Annette! Do thân hình gầy gò và yếu ớt, anh ấy đáng lẽ phải từ bỏ con đường kiếm đạo và sống một cuộc đời bình yên, nhưng không ông lại cầm chổi lên và đứng lên bảo vệ Rosarena, con gái của một gia tộc quý tộc sa sút. Một câu chuyện giả tưởng hấp dẫn về một người đàn ông hóa thành một cô gái xinh đẹp và bắt đầu lại cuộc đời mới!

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
"T-tớ đã cắm sừng cậu, không chỉ một anh đâu...là ba anh lận cơ!"
Những câu nói như gai sắt cứa vào tim cậu từ cuối cấp hai năm ấy vẫn còn làm cậu ám ảnh. Akiyoshi Sunao, hiện tại cậu đã trở thành sinh viên năm nhất và làm thành viên của câu lạc bộ phim ảnh, cậu còn nỗi ám ảnh kia là từ mối tình đầu hồi cuối cấp hai của cậu, Lemon Nishikawa. Cậu đã mất niềm tin vào tình yêu suốt cả cao trung, đến khi lên đại học thì anh đã phải lòng crush mới hơn mình một tuổi tên Kogahara Natsumi. Ngay khi cậu nghĩ mình đã suýt thì "move on" và tìm được tình yêu mới để tận hưởng thanh xuân, "Cô bạn" bắt cá bốn tay năm nào lại vô tình xuất hiện. Khoảnh khắc ấy, những câu nói chí mạng như hiện về cứa cậu thêm phát nữa...Cậu đã cố gắng lảng tránh cô người yêu cũ ấy và cổ vũ bản thân vượt lên sự kiện mọc sừng ấy. Cậu suýt thì thành công...
"S-sao mình lại biến thành ghệ cũ của mình?!"
Cậu đã bị hoán đổi linh hồn với chính cô nàng người yêu cũ ấy, và đối phương cũng nhận ra điều đó. Họ phải làm gì để vượt qua nghịch cảnh? Liệu họ có nhìn nhận lại những góc khuất của nhau? Và liệu họ có trở lại với nhau? Mời các bạn đọc truyện nhé!~

Fun fact: Tiêu đề tiếng Nhật của truyện này có thể được dịch thẳng là "Hạnh Phúc Nhé, Con Đĩ!"

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
Toru Aikawa, a college student who spends his days immersing himself in games because his daily life is so boring, was standing alone in a forest in a different world before he even could realize why. Moreover, it seems that he has reincarnated into the "Neta character" he made in a game. The Genderswap reincarnation of the strongest heroine packed with overflowing Chuunibyo and ideals!

The strongest genderswap reincarnation fantasy begins here !!

---

**Note:** A Neta character is a character whose action has captured the hearts of viewers and players and has been turned into a important part of the story.

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc: After a traffic accident, 52-year-old civil servant Kenzaburou Tondabayashi awakens to find he's become Grace Auvergne, a duke's daughter, and more importantly the villainess of an otome game. Not wanting to get in the way of the happy endings of the young characters around him, Grace sets out to play the role of the villain, but whether it's due to Kenzaburou's memories of being an affectionate parent getting in the way or not being able to remember those pesky foreign names properly, it ends up being a lot harder than it looks…

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc: Kim Sang Hyun nuôi ước mơ trở thành thần tượng, nhưng quá khứ từng là kẻ bắt nạt học đường khiến cậu mang tiếng xấu.  Một ngày nọ, cậu bất ngờ nhận được lời đề nghị từ một giám đốc cấp cao của công ty giải trí hàng đầu. Sau khi uống một viên thuốc bí ẩn, Sang Hyun bỗng hóa thành diện mạo của chính mình trong kiếp trước. Nhưng điều gây sốc hơn cả - hình ảnh phản chiếu trong gương lại là… một cô gái xinh đẹp?!  Giờ đây, cậu phải sinh tồn giữa những thực tập sinh khác mà không để lộ thân phận thật sự là một chàng trai! Liệu bí mật này có thể được giữ kín cho đến cuối cùng?

comics.title: Tensei Shitara Ore ga Heroine de Aitsu ga Yuusha Datta
comics.desc: Keito Azumi, an ordinary high school boy, was reincarnated as the heroine in a different world when he woke up in an accident! The worst thing about this is that his best friend became the hero!

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
Câu chuyện kể về Amona, một hắc thuật sư và Roni, một vị linh mục cao quý. Hai người đối nghịch nhau chung một tổ đội, tưởng không hòa hợp nhưng anh chị hòa cmn tan vào nhau. 

Không khuyến cáo đọc chỗ đông người.

comics.title: Onii-chan Is Done For! - Highschool ONIMAI (Doujinshi)
comics.desc: Without being able to return to being a man, Mahiro Oyama stayed as a girl since middle school and now has become a beautiful high-schooler who gets completely dominated by his first friend since the transformation, Momiji Hozuki, who has gotten really tall and became popular with the girls in their school.

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
Hinata Tachibana, a beleaguered 32-year-old office worker, and his handsome best friend Tsukasa Jinguuji were summoned to another world by a naked goddess. However, because of the goddess's mischief, Tachibana was turned into a peerless beautiful girl?! To get back his body, he has to go on a journey with his best friend to defeat the demon king!!   
  
However... will they be able to keep their hands off each other!?

"An older man that became a beautiful girl" and "a handsome older man"!

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc: His grades are average. His physical fitness is average. But when it comes to games, high school student Mikagami​ Kouji is a battle-worn veteran. After being summoned to another world by a magic circle, he's given only the Copy skill, which is derided as useless trash in this world. Enslaved as a gladiator by his summoner, Head Priestess Zayd, Mikagami is forced to fight in the horrible Battle Coliseum. Losing means getting raped. In this moment, as despair turns to hope, this is Mikagami's chance to grow!!

comics.title: Mahou Shoujo Jihen
comics.desc: Every child has a dream job, and for Hiromi Sakura, it was being a hero like his favorite color-coded defenders of justice. Unfortunately, not all wishes come true, and now he’s forever stuck with a miserable desk job- until one evening, when he steps up to save a little girl’s life. With his newfound courage and strength to fight evil, Hiromi transforms… into a magical girl?!

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
Junpei, a loner high school boy, became a gyaru after saving the God of Gyaru from drowning. Through his mother's connections, he was able to transfer to an all-girls school, but it was stuffed to the brim with gyarus! Every day is a sensory overload for Junpei, who's never even talked to a girl, let alone a gyaru.
___
 [Alternative Official Raw (NicoNico)](https://seiga.nicovideo.jp/comic/67976)

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc: Chiaka là 1 đứa con nhà người ta, đẹp trai, học giỏi, có chân giữa dài 20 cm nhưng mỗi tội ế. 1 ngày đẹp trời cậu ta tỉnh dậy và phát hiện bản thân đã biến thành con gái !!

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc: Uesugi-kun is a boy who's as petite and cute as a girl. He has a crush on a girl he's known since childhood, but overheard her saying, "Wouldn't Uesugi be totally adorable if he was a girl?!" Uesugi-kun's not as tall as his other childhood friend, Eito, nor is he as good at studies, and now he's suffering from a broken heart. A depressed Uesugi-kun stops by a shrine while running an errand and makes a wish...

comics.title: I'm My Own Girlfriend
comics.desc: What would happen if you were your own girlfriend? One night, Luo Yuchen gained the ability to transform into a beautiful girl. As he was adjusting to his newfound power, the mysterious girl who caused all this chaos finally showed up! Now, his day to day life has become a complete mess!

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
A man who drove countless couples to ruin in his past life is reborn as the angelic beauty Netora Reiko! But this girl has only one desire and it's "to experience the ultimate NTR!?"
The most despicable yet glorious romantic(?) comedy where an NTR-obsessed TS beauty sets out to deceive everyone around her and mentally destroy her childhood friend in the process!

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
Khi trở về thành phố nơi từng sống sau 10 năm, Amano Koichi đã gặp lại người bạn tuổi thơ là Yukio Sawatari vào ngày đầu tiên ở trường mới thì bỗng nhiên Yukio lại đổi giới tính?! Anh bị ảnh hưởng bởi một căn bệnh chỉ có trong một trong mười nghìn người gọi là "hội chứng đổi giới đột ngột"! 

Từ đây bắt đầu câu truyện về tình yêu với người bạn tuổi thơ đổi giới.

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
A boy who used to be abusive to girls wakes up one day as one.

"I'll go back being a boy soon," he thought, however that was not the case. 
Follow Akira as he grows and learns little by little to accept the puzzling changings in her surroundings and her heart.

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
Lynn's village getting attacked by bandits doesn't keep her down in the dumps for long! Picking up a sword housing an extraordinary pervert... I mean hero, Siegfried, she sets off on a journey of many bouts with various degenerat... ahem, heroes!
___
**Links:**
- Alternative Official English - [Comikey](https://comikey.com/comics/rosen-garten-saga-manga/525/), [MangaPlaza](https://mangaplaza.com/title/0303005019/)

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
It was in the year 2800 of the Midgard calendar. Back then, there was a Overlord who once reigned supreme and had reached the very brink of subduing the world. Her name was Lufasu Mafaalu, a great woman dreaded as the Black-Winged Overlord. She was too strong, too fast, and too beautiful. However, she was defeated by Heroes who opposed her ferocity, and her ambition was brought to an end.  
  
Or so went the story of our protagonist’s in-game character, whose body he now possesses for some reason in a world 200 years after Lufasu’s downfall. Follow our protagonist as he becomes unnecessarily feared by his surroundings and unnecessarily worshiped by his former subordinates as he―or now she―cheerfully travels around this fantasy world.

comics.title: Boku Girl
comics.desc:
Mizuki gets confessed to by a boy in front of a special mirror. Legend has it, that if you confess to someone you like in front of that mirror your wish comes true.  
  
There is a slight problem in this equation: Mizuki is just a very feminine looking boy.  
  
Also, it seems that he caught the attention of the Norse Trickster God, Loki, while glancing into the mirror. Loki decides out of boredom to mess with Mizuki and turns him into a real girl.

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc: This series includes TS, futanari, feminine boys/crossdressing, and etc.

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc: Ma Pháp Thiếu Nữ

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc: Our protagonist, the speedrunning emperor of *Another Verse*, suddenly feels sleepy in the middle of practice. When he awakens, the familiar opening of *Another Verse* is playing right before his eyes!? In this godly environment where his body is moving better than usual, he has to speedrun! Clear the game world faster than anyone!

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
Nakagawa Yuki, a popular boy at school, lives a fulfilling life, always assuring his friends Shinichi and Midori that he is happy. However, on his 17th birthday, his father tells him, "You're an alien," and he discovers that he has awakened to the ability to transform into other people. Then, by chance, Shinichi and Midori see Yuki transformed into a girl, and Shinichi falls in love with him at first sight...

(Source: Natalie, translated)

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc: J is a lone assassin feared as "untouchable" in the underworld. Megumi is a lonely girl who has no place at home or school. When the two meet, an unexpected story begins.

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
Fujiwara Kagetora is a high school student who is undefeated in fights and prides himself on being the toughest guy in school.
However, one day, he is involved in an unfortunate traffic accident.

When Kagetora wakes up after the accident, he has been transformed into a girl!
Then, to top it off, an unexpected visitor arrives!?!?

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
Yumemi Renge, a current high school girl who’s a TS reincarnate obsessed with VTubers and also a hardcore yuri fan, has made a bold decision—“I will dominate the VTuber world with a mesugaki (bratty girl) persona!”

After relentless effort, she successfully debuts as Hanayori Kohaku, and immediately sets out to seduce all her VTuber senpais and peers at her agency… but her bratty girl persona collapses almost immediately!

Despite that, her viewers love it, commenting things like “Brat lol”, “She’s basically Mama Hanayori now lol”, and “Don’t push yourself, Hanayori”. Through collab streams and real-life interactions, she gradually charms her legendary senpais and quirky peers one by one—what will happen next!?

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc: Godai, a policeman, who was removed from the investigations division of the police due to violence toward criminals. He teams up with Hidaka, a man who is a self-proclaimed "paranormal police investigator" with claims to have the ability to send Godai in the past to prevent all the horrific crimes that happened, is that even possible and what will be the consequences?

comics.title: Yamada-kun to 7-nin no Majo
comics.desc:
Ryu Yamada is a second year student at Suzaku High. Ryu is always late for school, naps in class and gets abysmal grades. His life is a dead bore. The beautiful Urara Shiraishi, on the other hand, is Suzaku High's brightest student. One day, without explanation, their bodies are swapped! Ryu ends up in Urara's body, and Urara in Ryu's.

---
Alt. Official English: [Kodansha](https://kodansha.us/series/yamada-kun-and-the-seven-witches/)

comics.title: Mahou Shoujo × Haiboku Saiban
comics.desc: In this world, Magical Girls are the only ones who can fight the "monsters," the invaders from another realm. They must be courageous, inspire hope in people, and above all, they must never be defeated! However, some girls crumble under this heavy responsibility and lose to the monsters, tarnishing the name of Magical Girls. In the courtroom of the "Defeat Trial," their disgrace is exposed, and they face severe punishment. To save these unfortunate girls, the rookie magical lawyer, Misago Yuuri, rushes to their aid!

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc: Anastasia, an elf renowned as a once-in-a-millennium magical talent, faces the final battle of a three-way war in another world. In the midst of battle with her arch enemies, the demon race, Anastasia is enveloped in an intense light and, when she awakens, finds herself on an uninhabited island. As Anastasia strolls around the island, a mysterious human appears before her, but she can no longer use magic…!?

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc: Ichiyoshi continues to work at a chocolate factory, locking away his "best" in his heart. One Christmas night, on his way home, he finds a mysterious superball that rolls out of the darkness...

comics.title: Change (JinYuan) Ss2
comics.desc: Tiếp nối phần 1 của Change (JinYuan)

comics.title: Holiday Yasumi's Twitter Shorts
comics.desc:
Twitter manga posted occasionally by Holiday Yasumi.

Each post is self-contained, despite being numbered by chapter, so you can read them in any order you choose. Certain characters also make recurring appearances.

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
In a world where the demon lord had been defeated and peace had arrived, Rex the magical doctor ran a clinic. But the patients brought in were all beyond saving compared to the world itself, people who'd XXX slimes or stuck their peens into man-eaters!? An otherworld perverted medical comedy begins!!
___
**Additional Links:**
- **Alt Official Raw:** [niconico Manga](https://manga.nicovideo.jp/comic/67171)
- [Official Twitter](https://x.com/magicdr_rex)

comics.title: Ai da toka Fukushuu da toka
comics.desc: One day, Kaede Koshiba's day began with a strange feeling. As his family and classmates tell his things that he does not remember, Kaede realizes that he is being replaced "every other day" by a strange girl named Yuka Tsutsumi. Just as Kaede tries to solve the strange phenomenon that suddenly happens to him, an incident occurs that changes Kaede and Yuka's daily life.

comics.title: Girl's Heart @ High School Boy
comics.desc: Ren Yoruno is an ordinary high school boy whose hobby is writing web novels. However, he finds that due to his lack of interactions with the opposite sex, he has no idea how to write female characters. That’s when he finds an ad about a miracle drug that can make you understand the feelings of women. But when he drinks it…

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc: A young girl fights on the frontlines in war. She has blonde hair, blue eyes, and nearly transparent white skin as she flies through the air and mercilessly strikes down her enemies. Her name is Tanya Degurechaff and speaks with a young girl's lisp while she commands the army. Tanya used to be one of Japan's elite office workers, but because of a wrathful god was reborn as a little girl. Prioritizing optimization and career advancement above all, she will become the most dangerous entity among the Imperial Army's sorcerers.

comics.title: Eroi Koto Suru Tame ni Kyonyuu Bishoujo Dorei wo Katta Hazu ga, Oshishou-sama to Shitawa Rete Omotta Toori ni Ikanaku Naru Hanashi
comics.desc: Halo is a talented female elf magician who has memories of when she was a man in her previous life, which is why she wishes to make out with a cute girl. Halo decides to buy Filia, a beautiful female slave with big breasts, but things don't go as she expects them to...

comics.title: Savage Fang Ojou-sama: Shijou Saikyou no Youhei wa Shijou Saikyou no Bougyaku Reijou to Natte Nidome no Sekai o Musou suru
comics.desc:
Đây là câu chuyện về một "công chúa" khuấy đảo cả thế giới.

Cô được Thần yêu thương, sở hữu mái tóc tuyệt đẹp và một thanh kiếm sắc bén đầy bạo lực. Cô từng là tiểu thư xinh đẹp nhất vương quốc, nhưng cũng là lính đánh thuê mạnh nhất với biệt danh "Nang Thú Hoang Dã." Giờ đây, tất cả bọn họ bắt đầu bị đè bẹp dưới chân của một cô gái vượt xa mọi kỳ vọng.

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
The introvert highschool student, Ayame Meita, comes across news of a "Magical Girl Majeri" protecting mankind from monsters. Rumors about her real identity float around, even in class. He finally gets a chance to talk to the gal Shion Anri, who is cute but has a standoffish aura that isolates her. What will come of their conversation...?!

After learning the secret of her loneliness, a heart-pounding magical life full of kindness begins!

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc: Kou Mitsuki là một game thủ với những kỹ năng phải nói là quá ghê gớm, có biệt danh là "Thợ săn táo Crim". Cậu tham gia thử nghiệm một thiết bị trò chơi mới cho trò chơi mới mà do chính cha của cậu tạo ra, "Destiny Unchained Online". Nhưng trò chơi đầy lỗi khi bắt đầu và phá vỡ giấc mộng trở thành nam ma cà rồng cool ngầu của cậu. Gặp gỡ những đồng minh tuyệt vời và bắt đầu cuộc chơi như vũ bão, câu chuyện về một game thủ hàng đầu nơi mà mọi thứ hay bất kì cái gì đều có thể thay đổi... bắt đầu!

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
For his high school debut, Minto Shishidou pretended to be an outgoing playboy, spinning lies about the girlfriends he goes through. This corner he backed himself into weighs heavily on his mind when he joins a school trip, and he’s determined to use the occasion to get a girlfriend for real.
But then an unimaginable incident strikes him and his classmates, setting the stage for a locked-room love comedy centered around the wishes of these boys and girls.

(Source: Natalie, translated)

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc:
[The Eternal Scattering Flowers: Fiore Caduto Eterna] is a game ill-suited of being known as a galge, as the main heroine would – regardless of the chosen route – meet her demise.

Fudou Niito, a resident of Japan, went to bed dissatisfied with the ending of the game. When he next awoke, he found himself in the body of the game’s hated fake saint, Elrise. Confused, but with an understanding that Elrise’s actions would spell disaster for many lives in the future, he took advantage of the situation and acted to change the course of history.

As a result, despite her rotten personality, Elrise was adored by those around her as a perfect saint. Furthermore, the game itself was intrinsically linked to his original world and changed accordingly to suit Elrise’s actions. Without any knowledge of what the hell was going on, the fake saint Elrise continued to alter her fate. A saint on the outside, but a man on the inside.

The transmigrator was a piece of shit and the person he transmigrated into was also a piece of shit. A combination of shit and shit would cause an accident – to create the greatest fake saint shitshow of the year!

comics.title: Unknown
comics.desc: Câu truyện ngắn về cuộc sống thường ngày của giáo sư bị hoán đổi giới tính và trợ lý của mình.
